project_type: pnpm monorepo with turbo orchestration - multi-package TypeScript ecosystem
language: TypeScript (strict mode, ES2022 target, ESNext modules, bundler resolution)
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + turbo v2. Each package has own typecheck/test/build/lint scripts. Root turbo.json defines task pipeline with ^build dependencies.
test_framework: vitest v2 with globals:true, v8 coverage. Tests live in src/__tests__/*.test.ts. Root vitest.config.ts defines shared config.
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install (from root), 2. pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live typecheck, 3. pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live test, 4. pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live build, 5. pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live lint
setup_instructions: pnpm install from workspace root. Node >= 22 required. pnpm@10.28.1 as packageManager.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm access. Node 22 available. No Docker needed for this package.
contribution_requirements: <=500 LOC per PR. Contract-first (interfaces before implementations). All 6 gates must pass (typecheck, test, build, lint, format, commitlint). Meaningful tests required.
key_patterns: Packages use: 'type: module', main/types point to src/index.ts, scripts are typecheck/test/build/lint. tsconfig extends ../../tsconfig.json with composite:true, outDir:./dist, rootDir:./src. Tests use describe/it/expect from vitest. index.ts re-exports all public API. Factory functions pattern (createXxx). No external deps unless needed.
directory_structure: Root: apps/, packages/, services/, infra/, e2e/, scripts/, docs/, models/. Packages are independent modules with their own package.json, tsconfig.json, src/ with index.ts entry. Tests in src/__tests__/. Build output in dist/.
